creator: markk@knigma.org
text:
Since update to p5-Params-Classify-0.015, this doesn't build on my box. There's so sign of Clasify.so.

mkn@shrewd$ cd /usr/ports/devel/p5-Params-Classify
mkn@shrewd$ sudo make clean all
===>  Cleaning for p5-Params-Classify-0.015

Stop.

mkn@shrewd$ perl -v

This is perl 5, version 24, subversion 2 (v5.24.2) built for amd64-freebsd-thread-multi

mkn@shrewd$ uname -a
